title: status-pipeline output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``status-pipeline`` envelope.

``stage_reached`` is the deterministic dispatch the agent used to walk by
hand. ``needs_decision`` flags the lifecycle outcomes that require a caller
decision (failed / abandoned) — the decision-as-data shape (#231): the
pipeline ran the lifecycle branch; only the genuine judgement (classify the
failure, decide resubmit) is handed back.

stage_reached.description: Which lifecycle the monitored run reached.
stage_reached.title: Stage Reached

needs_decision.description: True for failed / abandoned (the caller classifies + decides resubmit/reconcile); False for the clean terminals (complete / timeout).
needs_decision.title: Needs Decision

reason.description: Human-readable summary of the outcome / what must be decided.
reason.title: Reason

last_status.description: Final per-task status snapshot from the cluster-side reporter.
last_status.title: Last Status

ticks.description: Poll iterations monitor-flow executed before terminal/budget.
ticks.title: Ticks

escalation_reason.description: monitor-flow's escalation_reason when it stopped short of 'complete' (e.g. failed_tasks_no_auto_recover_in_mvp); null on a clean complete.
escalation_reason.title: Escalation Reason
